title: Medium White Gold Gift Bags for Present,Paper Party Bags with Handles,3Pcs Birthday Gift Bag with Ribbons 6 Tissue Paper 3 Cards for Girls Boys Women Men Bridesmaid Wedding Baby Shower Christmas
features: Material:Made of premium environmental friendly material,the paper gift bags are sturdy and recyclable.They are thick enough to hold up well and not easy to break,and the robust handle and bottom make it easy to take around

Bow Ribbon Design:The ribbon bows with gift bags will not only add an elegant high-end atmosphere ,but also enrich your gift, making your gift more luxury and special. With the chic look and brilliant quality,the gift bag will be appreciated by the recipient not only what's inside but the overall presentation.It will create sweet memories for your and receiver

Reusable Paper Gift Bags:The bottom of each paper birthday gift bag are reinforced to improve its durability. The super sturdy structure has an extra filling bottom, which is durable and reliable, easy to fill, store and carry, and can be used for a long time

Decorate For Any Occasion:These versatile medium gift bags with handles can be used for small business purposes or as boutique shopping bags to hold. Whether it's baby showers, birthday parties, holiday parties, weddings or dinner parties, these gift bags are your ideal choice for gifts packages, gift bags, party bags, retail bags and more

Package Includes:You will receive 3pcs of paper gift bags with handles and paired with gold ribbon 6 tissue paper 3 cards for you to tie a beautiful bow. There is no text on the gift bag, you can write your blessing on the bag to express your feelings
